stemHtml: A pilot has a total duty period of 180 hours in the last 27 days, he/she has a 8 hours duty period scheduled for the 28th. He/she can…

options.a: Fly because the maximum duty period is 200 hours in 28 days.
options.b: Fly because the maximum duty period is 190 hours in 28 days.
options.c: Not fly because you can’t fly 185 hours in 28 days.
options.d: Not fly because the maximum duty period is 100 hours in 28 days.
